allow: Bash(git commit -m 'IssueOut: remove Verify step; restore stock on delete *)
PowerShell(git commit -m "Login: add Forgot password or username help link pointing users to the administrator for credential recovery")
PowerShell(git commit -m "Migrate login to Supabase Auth \(username sign-in, edge-function user admin, email password reset\)")
PowerShell(git commit -m "Login: email-based forgot-password + forgot-username \(send-username edge function via Resend\)")
PowerShell(git commit -m "send-username: send via SMTP \(Gmail\) instead of Resend \(no domain needed\)")
PowerShell(git commit -m "Drop legacy plaintext password column \(migration + stop writing/reading it\)")
PowerShell(git commit -m "Fix RLS: broaden public_all policies from anon to public so logged-in users can read/write")
PowerShell(git commit -m "Administrator: surface real edge-function errors + guard duplicate login emails")
PowerShell(git commit -m "admin-users: self-healing create reuses existing Auth account instead of erroring on duplicate email")
PowerShell(git commit -m "Production: lock past months on the 16th of next month, with bypassProductionLock permission")
PowerShell(git commit -m "Production Report: make view-only \(remove grid editing + dead editProductionReport perm\)")
